## Description

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why -->

## Related issue(s)

<!-- Link to issue(s): e.g. Fixes #123, Relates to #45 (merging will auto-close "Fixes" issues) -->

## Type of change

<!-- Match commit type: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, build, ci -->

- [ ] `feat` – New feature
- [ ] `fix` – Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` – Documentation only
- [ ] `style` – Formatting, no code change
- [ ] `refactor` – Code change, no feature/fix
- [ ] `perf` – Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` – Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` – Tooling, config, dependencies
- [ ] `build` / `ci` – Build or CI changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows [commit format](.cursor/rules/commit-format.mdc) (`type(scope): subject` + body with details)
- [ ] Code follows [coding standards](docs/guidelines/coding_standards.md) (no hardcoded copy/colors, Tailwind, design tokens)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (or new/updated tests included)
- [ ] i18n: New/changed UI text is in `messages/en.json` and `messages/th.json` (if applicable)
- [ ] No inline styles; internal links use `Link` components where appropriate

## Optional

- **Screenshots:** If UI changed, add before/after or key states
- **Breaking changes:** Describe migration or impact
